purpose_context: Today the runtime contradicts the docs: validate_transition() accepts unforced backward transitions (in_progress/for_review/in_review/approved → planned) when a review_ref is present, while the module docstring, dossier docs, and conformance manifest all say force=True is required. This split makes consumers infer behavior from missing-field side effects rather than the contract, blocks issue #32, and leaves #29/#31 unresolvable. This mission closes the gap so docs, runtime, fixtures, and tests describe one fail-closed contract.
purpose_tldr: Make every layer of spec-kitty-events agree that the WPStatusChanged review-rejection family requires force=True.
